title: Rubio: ‘Trump’s not going to make a bad deal’
full_text:
Rubio: 'Trump's not going to make a bad deal'
Rubio: ‘Trump’s not going to make a bad deal’
US Secretary of State Marco Rubio has insisted President Donald Trump is ‘not going to make a bad deal’ in ending its war on Iran. Earlier, Trump said he instructed his team not to rush into any agreement.
Published On 25 May 2026
